quote.en:
Thanks for your interest! To give you an accurate quote, I need:

📦 1. From which city/port in China?
📍 2. To where in Malaysia?
📋 3. What cargo?
📐 4. Volume (CBM) or weight (KG)?
📅 5. When do you need to ship?

I'll get back with a competitive rate ASAP! 🚢
quote.cn:
收到！为了给你准确报价，需要以下信息：

📦 1. 从中国哪里出？
📍 2. 到马来西亚哪里？
📋 3. 什么货？
📐 4. 多大体积/多重？
📅 5. 什么时候出？

确认后马上报价！

tracking.en:
Let me check the status for you! 🔍

Could you share your booking reference number or B/L number?
tracking.cn:
帮你查一下！🔍

请发一下订单号或提单号？

schedule.en:
Transit time reference:

🚢 Sea: China → PKL: 7-12 days
China → East MY: +3-5 days
✈️ Air: China → KUL: 1-3 days

Plus 2-3 days for customs & delivery. Need exact timing? Share your route!
schedule.cn:
时效参考：

🚢 海运：中国→巴生港 7-12天
中国→东马 再加3-5天
✈️ 空运：中国→吉隆坡 1-3天

加上清关和派送一般还要2-3天。要具体线路的时效告诉我！

service.en:
We offer:

✅ Sea freight (FCL & LCL)
✅ Air freight
✅ Customs clearance
✅ Door-to-door delivery
✅ East MY transshipment
✅ Cargo insurance

What do you need? I'll quote you the best rate! 💪
service.cn:
我们的服务：

✅ 海运（整柜/拼柜）
✅ 空运
✅ 报关清关
✅ 送货到门
✅ 东马转运
✅ 货物保险

需要什么服务？帮你报最优价！

greeting.en:
Hi! 👋 Thanks for reaching out!

I'm your freight forwarding assistant. How can I help you today?

🚢 Sea freight quotes
✈️ Air freight quotes
📦 Shipment tracking
📋 Customs clearance
greeting.cn:
Hi! 👋 感谢联系！

我是你的货运助手，有什么可以帮你的？

🚢 海运报价
✈️ 空运报价
📦 货物追踪
📋 清关服务

unknown.en:
Thanks for your message! I'll have our team get back to you shortly. 🙏

In the meantime, you can:
• Ask for a quote
• Check shipment status
• Get transit time info
unknown.cn:
收到！我会尽快让团队回复你 🙏

你也可以直接问我：
• 报价查询
• 货物状态
• 时效信息
